records.question: Which female students named Schmidt, aged at least 26 and living in WAS, spend exactly 50 hours per week on sports and are not on scholarship?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN sportsinfo ON student.stuid = sportsinfo.stuid
WHERE student.age >= 26 AND student.sex = 'F' AND student.city_code = 'WAS' AND sportsinfo.hoursperweek = 50 AND student.lname = 'Schmidt' AND sportsinfo.onscholarship = 'N'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.StuID FROM Student AS T1 INNER JOIN SportsInfo AS T2 ON T1.StuID = T2.StuID WHERE T1.Sex = 'F' AND T1.LName = 'Schmidt' AND T1.Age >= 26 AND T1.city_code = 'WAS' AND T2.HoursPerWeek = 50 AND T2.OnScholarship = 'N'

records.question: Which female students named Linda advised by 1121 play Athletics without a scholarship, spend exactly 2 hours per week on it, have played at most 5 games, and have spent at least 15 hours playing games overall?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN plays_games ON student.stuid = plays_games.stuid
JOIN sportsinfo ON student.stuid = sportsinfo.stuid
WHERE plays_games.hours_played >= 15 AND student.fname = 'Linda' AND sportsinfo.gamesplayed <= 5 AND sportsinfo.sportname = 'Athletics' AND student.sex = 'F' AND sportsinfo.onscholarship = 'N' AND sportsinfo.hoursperweek = 2 AND student.advisor = 1121
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.StuID
FROM Student AS T1
INNER JOIN SportsInfo AS T2
  ON T1.StuID = T2.StuID
INNER JOIN Plays_Games AS T3
  ON T1.StuID = T3.StuID
WHERE
  T1.Sex = 'F' AND T1.Fname = 'Linda' AND T1.Advisor = 1121 AND T2.SportName = 'Athletics' AND T2.OnScholarship = 'N' AND T2.HoursPerWeek = 2 AND T2.GamesPlayed <= 5
GROUP BY
  T1.StuID
HAVING
  SUM(T3.Hours_Played) >= 15

records.question: Which students have played no more than 15 hours of games but have participated in at least 5 games overall?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN plays_games ON student.stuid = plays_games.stuid
JOIN sportsinfo ON student.stuid = sportsinfo.stuid
WHERE plays_games.hours_played <= 15 AND sportsinfo.gamesplayed >= 5
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.StuID
FROM (
    SELECT StuID
    FROM Plays_Games
    GROUP BY StuID
    HAVING SUM(Hours_Played) <= 15
) AS T1
JOIN (
    SELECT StuID
    FROM SportsInfo
    GROUP BY StuID
    HAVING SUM(GamesPlayed) >= 5
) AS T2
ON T1.StuID = T2.StuID
